title: Networks Terminals
description: A central ME-like UI to access all items in your storage system easily
body:
# Networks Terminals

This is an addon for the Paper plugin [Networks](https://modrinth.com/plugin/networks)

It allows you to access all items in your network in one central UI with the simple command `/nt`

This is still in development and may be subject to larger changes.

## Setup your own server

You don't have a server yet? Use code [`NETWORKS`](https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=NETWORKS) to [get 30% off](https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=NETWORKS) your own Minecraft server! 

[![Use Code NETWORKS to get 30% off your first Minecraft server!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9eaf75d9122fb24a1c8cc0649c4f413d76cb49e_0.webp)](https://www.neyhost.com/?ref=NETWORKS)
